hypothesis: Backtest known_biases should disclose the current earnings snapshot reality and pending-action replay gap accurately without changing trading behavior.

earnings_event_long_data_quality.remaining_gap: coverage/ticker-level sparsity, not an always-None field

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: This clarifies that LLM position_actions and pending_actions.json are still not replayed; future work needs point-in-time action ledger snapshots.

decision_reason: Accepted because it removes stale measurement metadata, adds an explicit pending-action gap bucket, and leaves fixed-window trading metrics unchanged.
risk: Future readers might still see the legacy placeholder literal in code; the result dict overwrites it with live snapshot coverage before returning.
do_not_repeat_without_new_evidence: Treating earnings_event_long as days_to_earnings-only when snapshot_archive_present is true.
Claiming LLM position_actions are replayed by canonical backtests.
Replaying the current pending_actions.json ledger as if it were point-in-time historical state.
